description: You are a tax compliance analyst at Ironclad Industrial Supply, a B2B equipment distributor. Configure the system for industrial machinery taxation by establishing a Product Tax Class named 'Industrial Machinery' and two tax rates: 'California State Tax' (US/CA, 7.25%, wildcard zip) and 'New York State Tax' (US/NY, 4.00%, wildcard zip). Implement a Tax Rule named 'Industrial Equipment Tax Rule' that applies both rates to the 'Industrial Machinery' product class for the 'Taxable Goods' customer class at priority 0. Data sources: California BOE base rate 7.25% (2017); New York State Dept. of Taxation base rate 4.00%. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.

metadata.data_source: California Board of Equalization base state rate 7.25% (effective 2017); New York State Department of Taxation base state rate 4.00%
